doc_title: van Berg, Kowalski & Wright (2025). Learning-Styles-Matched Instruction: A Meta-Analysis of 124 Studies. Educational Psychology Review, 37(3), 612-651.
label: fabricated
reason: This claims large positive effects for learning-styles matching that directly contradict the established scientific consensus showing no credible evidence for this approach.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: This purports to be a 2025 meta-analysis showing large positive effects (d=0.62) for learning styles matching, directly contradicting the well-established scientific consensus and multiple genuine systematic reviews (Pashler et al. 2008, Rogowsky et al. 2015) that found no credible evidence supporting learning-styles-matched instruction.
